memories.title: API Rate Limits
memories.content: OpenAI API rate limit is 10,000 RPM for GPT-4o on current plan. Retry with exponential backoff after 429 responses. Consider batching requests when possible to stay within limits.

memories.title: Research Methodology
memories.content: When researching market data, always cross-reference at least 3 independent sources. Prioritize government statistics and industry reports over blog posts. Include confidence levels for all findings.

memories.title: Newsletter Brand Voice
memories.content: Newsletter tone should be professional but approachable. Use active voice. Keep paragraphs under 3 sentences. Include one data point per section. Always end with a clear call-to-action.

memories.title: Team Coordination Protocol
memories.content: When delegating tasks: 1) Break into atomic units 2) Assign based on agent specialization 3) Set clear success criteria 4) Monitor progress every 15 minutes 5) Escalate blockers immediately.

memories.title: Data Source Rankings
memories.content: Tier 1: Bureau of Labor Statistics, SEC filings, Census Bureau. Tier 2: Industry association reports, peer-reviewed journals. Tier 3: News outlets, analyst blogs. Always cite source tier in reports.

memories.title: Content Archive Structure
memories.content: All 2025 content has been organized into: /reports (42 files), /newsletters (52 weekly editions), /social (186 posts), /internal (28 memos). Total word count: ~450,000 words.
